series_metadata.series_title: Application for Special Hauling Permits OS-1
series_metadata.series_description: Contains description of load, including dimensions and weights; origin and destination points; starting date; and type of permit.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in active area for one month, then destroy after scanned into electronic format. ; Electronic: Retain information on computer for a period of five years., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
